overall.description: A cinematic scene from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai warrior in traditional armor and a straw hat standing under a wooden shelter. The character overlooks a dramatic stormy landscape with dark clouds gathering over misty mountains and autumn-colored forests while playing a flute.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shrine overlook facing stormy mountain valley

events.description: character raises a flute to their mouth to begin playing
character lowers the flute and returns to neutral standing pose

agents.ego_description: samurai character stands under wooden shelter playing a flute while gazing out at the stormy mountain landscape

entered.detail: dark wooden posts and beams forming the sheltered overlook
misty mountain peak partially obscured by storm clouds
dark turbulent storm clouds with greenish tint covering the sky
hillside covered with dense yellow and orange autumn foliage
low-lying fog and mist rising from the valleys between forested hills

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands under a wooden shelter overlooking a dramatic stormy landscape. Dark clouds gather over distant mountains while yellow autumn forests cover the hillsides below. The character plays a flute briefly before lowering it, remaining stationary throughout the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective of a samurai under a wooden shelter as the surrounding atmosphere grows increasingly heavy with an approaching storm. It begins with the warrior overlooking a dramatic landscape where dark clouds gather over distant, jagged mountains. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts to the vibrant yellow autumn forests that blanket the hillsides below. The scene concludes as the samurai briefly plays a flute before lowering the instrument, remaining still against the backdrop of the darkening sky.
